001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueReport;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueType;
005import java.util.List;
006import java.util.UUID;
007
008/**
009 * API DTO representing an issue report, including flattened location/status information and image DTOs.
010 *
011 * @param externalId report external identifier.
012 * @param textDescription user-supplied description text.
013 * @param acceptedState accepted-state/status tag, if set.
014 * @param latitude report location latitude.
015 * @param longitude report location longitude.
016 * @param streetCoordinate report street address/coordinate text, if set.
017 * @param locationDescription free-form location description, if set.
018 * @param issueTypes issue type tags associated with the report.
019 * @param reportImages images associated with the report.
020 */
021public record IssueReportDto(
022    UUID externalId,
023    String textDescription,
024    String acceptedState,
025    double latitude,
026    double longitude,
027    String streetCoordinate,
028    String locationDescription,
029    List<String> issueTypes,
030    List<ReportImageDto> reportImages
031) {
032
033  /**
034   * Creates a DTO view of the provided entity.
035   *
036   * @param entity source entity.
037   * @return DTO populated from {@code entity}.
038   */
039  public static IssueReportDto from(IssueReport entity) {
040    double latitude = 0.0;
041    double longitude = 0.0;
042    String streetCoordinate = null;
043    String locationDescription = null;
044    if (entity.getReportLocation() != null) {
045      if (entity.getReportLocation().getLatitude() != null) {
046        latitude = entity.getReportLocation().getLatitude();
047      }
048      if (entity.getReportLocation().getLongitude() != null) {
049        longitude = entity.getReportLocation().getLongitude();
050      }
051      streetCoordinate = entity.getReportLocation().getStreetCoordinate();
052      locationDescription = entity.getReportLocation().getLocationDescription();
053    }
054    String acceptedState = (entity.getAcceptedState() != null)
055        ? entity.getAcceptedState().getStatusTag()
056        : null;
057    return new IssueReportDto(
058        entity.getExternalId(),
059        entity.getTextDescription(),
060        acceptedState,
061        latitude,
062        longitude,
063        streetCoordinate,
064        locationDescription,
065        entity.getIssueTypes().stream()
066            .map(IssueType::getIssueTypeTag)   // ⭐ FIXED HERE
067            .toList(),
068        entity.getReportImages().stream()
069            .map(ReportImageDto::from)
070            .toList()
071    );
072  }
073
074}
